[Triple Drop Campaign Preview]

Starting 12/29 (Mon), Scrimmage reward will be tripled!
Don't miss out on this opportunity to develop exclusive Weapons!

🗓️Period: 12/29 (Mon) 7:00 PM – 1/5 (Mon) 6:59 PM (UTC)
